$comment: Ratchet baseline for guard:template-standard. Every entry is a known, pre-existing template-standard gap accepted for now (Phase 1 does not edit templates/*). The guard only fails on NEW drift not listed here. Fix the underlying template and delete the entry instead of leaving it here once addressed. See scripts/template-standard/baseline.ts for the reconciliation rules.

violations.note: Extended the shared scaffold with real app-specific learnings (metric definitions, schema/provider gotchas). Content divergence is intentional, not a defect — Phase 2/3 should decide whether byte-exact is even the right rule for a file the agent is meant to keep updating.
Extended the shared scaffold (and reworded its header) with real app-specific learnings. Same reasoning as analytics — intentional customization, not a gap to silently overwrite.
